name: shared-agent-memory
description: API-backed MCP server for shared AI agent memory across Claude Code sessions and projects.

memory_api_url.title: Memory API URL
memory_api_url.description: Base URL for the shared-agent-memory REST API.

memory_api_key.title: Memory API key
memory_api_key.description: Bearer token for the shared-agent-memory REST API.

default_agent.title: Default agent
default_agent.description: Agent name stored on new memories when the tool call does not provide one.

default_project.title: Default project override
default_project.description: Optional project name for new memories. Leave empty to detect from the current git repo or folder.
